race.description: Share Bets With Tabtouch Bet Loop Hcp
race.comment: VANDOULA JET (8) jumped favourite last start at Pinjarra and couldn't get the job done, missing in a photo finish. The form out of that race has been sound though and Steve Parnham sticks. She remains down in the weights today and can go one better this time. RAINLINE (3) missed in a photo two back before jumping fave in the Provincial Final last start at Belmont. Back to this level is a big tick and Nottle knows her well. Watch for her flying late. CLEANEMUP (2) missed by 2L last time out in a Saturday race and now gets Chris Parnham back in the saddle today. Building into the campaign nicely and some sting out of the ground should suit her better. Can be in the finish. LIPSTICK JUNGLE (11) is in the mix on her best form and can bounce back following a disappointing run last time out. CRUISE TO RIO (6) can bounce back following a poor run last time out.
